primary_purpose: Brand and visual-asset scaffold repository intended to store AFI Protocol logos, token icons, and media kits for frontend/docs consumption; all asset directories are currently empty placeholders.
classification_rationale: README.asset.md:3 states "This repo stores all visual, brand, and identity-related files for the AFI Protocol." package.json:4 description is "AFI brand assets, logos, and design files". The logos/, tokens/, media_kits/ dirs contain only .gitkeep (0 bytes). No schemas, contracts, protocol code, or determinism logic exist. It is org-supporting tooling, not a normative artifact, reference impl, research, or pure docs. Not classified STALE since it is an intentionally minimal/early scaffold, though .aider.conf.json is stale boilerplate copied from another repo.
protocol_touchpoints: none — no USS/CPJ ingest, TSSD/vault, mint/receipt, DAG/pipeline, schemas, contracts, emissions, replay, registries, SDK/API, or analytics surfaces are present; the tokens/ dir is for token ICON imagery, not token contracts

downstream: Consumed (read-only) per README.asset.md by: frontend dashboards, agentic UIs, docs/GitBook generators — aspirational; no code dependency edges exist since the repo is empty

contradictions.title: Stale .aider config impersonates afi-core with non-existent protocol dirs
contradictions.detail: The .aider.conf.json is boilerplate copied from a core repo: it sets repo_name 'afi-core' and includes schemas/, signal_schema_test/, runtime/, mentor/, cli/ globs and a 'schemas, prompts, and runtime validation' description — none of which exist in afi-assets (verified MISSING). This is misleading provenance, not a portable-protocol contradiction, but could confuse tooling/agents into thinking schemas live here.
contradictions.evidence: /home/user/AFI-Protocol/afi-assets/.aider.conf.json:31-32 "repo_name": "afi-core", "description": "Agentic Financial Intelligence: Core module config for schemas, prompts, and runtime validation"

notable_findings.title: Repository is an empty brand-asset scaffold (placeholders only)
notable_findings.evidence: logos/.gitkeep, tokens/.gitkeep, media_kits/.gitkeep are all 0 bytes; only 10 non-git files total exist
notable_findings.recommendation: No action for protocol surface; this repo holds no normative or replay-critical content.

notable_findings.title: Only protocol-keyword hits are in stale aider boilerplate, not real content
notable_findings.evidence: /home/user/AFI-Protocol/afi-assets/.aider.conf.json:3-4 "schemas/**/*.ts", "signal_schema_test/**/*.ts" — referenced dirs verified MISSING; full pattern grep (mongodb|vault|TSSD|USS|CPJ|mint|epoch|replay|DAG|orchestrator|emissions|postgresql|etc.) found ZERO hits outside this stub
notable_findings.recommendation: Remove or correct .aider.conf.json (repo_name afi-core, phantom schema/runtime/cli globs) to avoid misleading agents/tooling into treating afi-assets as a schema/runtime repo.

notable_findings.title: package.json build/test scripts are unimplemented stubs
notable_findings.recommendation: None required for protocol audit; expected for an early scaffold.

notable_findings.title: tokens/ directory is for token ICON imagery, not on-chain token contracts
notable_findings.recommendation: Note for cross-repo synthesis: do not conflate this tokens/ asset dir with afi-token contract sources; no commitment-plane content here.
